name: the aggregator with --project includes the per-project overlay tagged origin project and scoped by project_id
command: ID=P556A01; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-rules.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --source-file g.txt --source-id sid --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; R=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --project $ID --format json 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'r=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["rules"].select{|x|x["origin"]=="project"}; puts(r.length>=1 && r.all?{|x|x["project_id"]=="'$ID'"} ? "ok":"no")'); rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID; [ "$R" = ok ] && echo project-overlay-included 1>&2
setup: printf '%s\n' 'Always bind a unique key to every loop element.' 'Never combine conditional and loop on one element.' > g.txt
